rationale: Keep: the cited paper is highly topically and conceptually aligned (both are JMR WOM-transmission studies on what content people share, with sender-side mechanisms), and the citing note explicitly positions its contribution as extending prior work on transmission drivers. Given the cited paper’s claimed foundational role on audience structure (broadcasting vs narrowcasting) and mechanism (self/other focus), it is plausibly a direct theory/comparison source rather than an incidental mention.
